title: Incorrect warning "Unsupported: randomizing this expression, treating as state"
body:
```
./test_regress/t/t_randomize_method_with.py 2>&1 | tee log
==SUMMARY: Left 1  Passed 0  Failed 0  Time 0:00
driver.py: Found 24 cores, using -j 24
======================================================================
vlt/t_randomize_method_with: ==================================================
	export GCOV_PREFIX_STRIP='99'
	export GCOV_PREFIX='/work/sols/work/verilator/test_regress/obj_dist/gcov_1'
	perl /work/sols/work/verilator/test_regress/../bin/verilator --prefix Vt_randomize_method_with -cc -Mdir obj_vlt/t_randomize_method_with --fdedup --debug-check --comp-limit-members 10 --x-assign unique --make gmake --exe ../obj_vlt/t_randomize_method_with/Vt_randomize_method_with__main.cpp --fno-inline --clk clk -f input.vc +define+TEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_randomize_method_with +define+TEST_DUMPFILE=obj_vlt/t_randomize_method_with/simx.vcd t/t_randomize_method_with.v   > obj_vlt/t_randomize_method_with/vlt_compile.log
%Warning-CONSTRAINTIGN: t/t_randomize_method_with.v:137:34: Unsupported: randomizing this expression, treating as state
                                                          : ... note: In instance 'mwith'
  137 |     c = cls.randomize() with { b inside {IDS}; };
      |                                  ^~~~~~
                        ... For warning description see https://verilator.org/warn/CONSTRAINTIGN?v=5.029
                        ... Use "/* verilator lint_off CONSTRAINTIGN */" and lint_on around source to disable this message.
%Error: Exiting due to 1 warning(s)
```

Can you attach an example that shows the issue?  (Must be openly licensed, ideally in test_regress format.)

```
git diff
diff --git a/test_regress/t/t_randomize_method_with.v b/test_regress/t/t_randomize_method_with.v
index 616864d7b..d7612afa2 100644
--- a/test_regress/t/t_randomize_method_with.v
+++ b/test_regress/t/t_randomize_method_with.v
@@ -18,6 +18,10 @@ begin \
    if (ok != 1) $stop; \
 end
 
+//package cfg_pkg;
+   parameter int IDS[3] = {2, 3, 5};
+//endpackage
+
 class Boo;
   function new();
     boo = 6;
@@ -130,6 +134,8 @@ module mwith();
         $display("Failed to randomize foo with inline constraints");
     end
 
+    c = cls.randomize() with { b inside {IDS}; };
+
     if (cls.randomize() with { b == 1;} != 1) $stop;
```

What 'verilator' command line do we use to run your example?

`verilator --prefix Vt_randomize_method_with -cc -Mdir obj_vlt/t_randomize_method_with --fdedup --debug-check --comp-limit-members 10 --x-assign unique --make gmake --exe ../obj_vlt/t_randomize_method_with/Vt_randomize_method_with__main.cpp --fno-inline --clk clk -f input.vc +define+TEST_OBJ_DIR=obj_vlt/t_randomize_method_with +define+TEST_DUMPFILE=obj_vlt/t_randomize_method_with/simx.vcd t/t_randomize_method_with.v`

What 'verilator --version' are you using?  Did you try it with the git master version?

`Verilator 5.029 devel rev v5.028-72-g521c5c2f7`

What OS and distribution are you using?

`Linux 5.14.0-427.33.1.el9_4.x86_64`
